comment: Pack 1 v3 — fixes: (1) opening = pack held up to camera 86.4-87.6 (right shot, not the 90s lull). (2) fan 105.0-106.4 stays. (3) each card cut at the SLIDE ONSET (from full-res motion curve) and held THROUGH the settle, not cut mid-slide. card1 onset 107.3 settle~110.8; card2 onset 112.0 settle~114.7 (was missed entirely); card3 onset 116.5 settle~117.6; card4 onset 118.6 settle~120.2.

segments.note: OPEN: sealed pack held up to camera (single beat, ~1.2s)
FAN: cards fanned out (original 1:45-1:46.5) — not counted toward card 1
card 1: slide onset 107.3, plays full slide-up + holds through settle ~110.8
card 2 (was MISSED): slide onset 112.0, settles & holds ~114.7
card 4: slide onset 118.6, clean 3->4 slide, cut before previous-card comeback
